summary: All valid outputs come from only 36 fixed substrings of the nine-character decimal sequence, so runtime scaling is not meaningful.

workload_bound.source_constraint: low and high are at most 10^9, so candidates use at most digits 1 through 9

replacement_checks.evidence: The implementation enumerates the fixed 36 substrings once, performs constant-bounded conversion work, and filters each candidate once.
Regression independently constructs all 36 candidates numerically and checks every interval formed by candidate-adjacent legal boundaries.
